zh.Wingfield, Suffolk, England: 英國素福爾可文費爾德
zh.St. Andrew's Church, Wingfield, Suffolk,: 英國素福爾可文費爾德
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John de Wingfield於1325年出生在英國素福爾可文費爾德時，他的父親John Wingfield20歲，母親Elizabeth Honeypot17歲。他於大約1348年與Alianore de Glanville在英國素福爾可文費爾德結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他去世於1361年11月8日之前在他的家鄉，埋葬在英國素福爾可文費爾德。

zh-hans.Wingfield, Suffolk, England: 英国素福爾可文費爾德
zh-hans.St. Andrew's Church, Wingfield, Suffolk,: 英国素福爾可文費爾德
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John de Wingfield于1325年出生在英国素福爾可文費爾德时，他的父亲John Wingfield20岁，母亲Elizabeth Honeypot17岁。他于大约1348年与Alianore de Glanville在英国素福爾可文費爾德结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。他去世于1361年11月8日之前在他的家乡，埋葬在英国素福爾可文費爾德。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Wingfield
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Winfield
meanings: English: habitational name from Wingfield in Derbyshire, Bedfordshire, Suffolk, and Wiltshire. The Derbyshire placename probably derives from Old English winn ‘pasture, meadow’ + feld ‘open country’. The Bedfordshire placename may derive from Old English wince ‘nook, corner’ + feld. The Suffolk placename may derive from the Old English personal name Wiga + the Old English groupname suffix -ingas (genitive -inga-) or Old English wīg ‘idol’ + feld. The Wiltshire placename derives from the Old English personal name Wina + Old English feld.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John de Wingfield was born in 1325, in Wingfield, Suffolk, England, his father, John Wingfield, was 20 and his mother, Elizabeth Honeypot, was 17. He married Alianore de Glanville about 1348, in Wingfield, Suffolk, England. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died before 8 November 1361, in his hometown, and was buried in Wingfield, Suffolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John de Wingfield est né en 1325, à Wingfield, Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, John Wingfield, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Honeypot, avait 17 ans. Il a épousé Alianore de Glanville environ 1348, à Wingfield, Suffolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé avant 8 novembre 1361, dans sa ville natale, et a été enterré à Wingfield, Suffolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John de Wingfield 1325 in Wingfield, Suffolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Wingfield 20 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Honeypot 17. Er hat um 1348 in Wingfield, Suffolk, England Alianore de Glanville geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb vor 8. November 1361 in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Wingfield, Suffolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John de Wingfield è nato il nel 1325 nel Wingfield, Suffolk, England, il suo padre, John Wingfield, aveva 20 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Honeypot, aveva 17 anni. Lui sposato Alianore de Glanville circa 1348, nel Wingfield, Suffolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì prima del 8 novembre 1361, nel sua cittadina, e fu sepolto a Wingfield, Suffolk, England.

ja.Wingfield, Suffolk, England: イギリススフォルクウィングフィールド
ja.St. Andrew's Church, Wingfield, Suffolk,: イギリススフォルクウィングフィールド
ja.lifeSummary: Sir John de Wingfieldが1325年にイギリススフォルクウィングフィールドで生まれた時，父John Wingfieldは20歳，母Elizabeth Honeypotは17歳であった。約1348年にイギリススフォルクウィングフィールドでAlianore de Glanvilleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼は1361年11月8日以前に故郷で死去し，イギリススフォルクウィングフィールドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John de Wingfield(이)가 1325년 영국 수폴크 윙필드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Wingfield(은)는 20세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Honeypot(은)는 17세였다. 그는 대략 1348년 영국 수폴크 윙필드에서 Alianore de Glanville(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1361년 11월 8일 이전 그의 고향에서 사망했으며 영국 수폴크 윙필드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John de Wingfield nasceu em 1325, em Wingfield, Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Wingfield, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Honeypot, tinha 17 anos. Ele casou-se com Alianore de Glanville aproximadamente 1348, em Wingfield, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ele faleceu antes 8 de novembro de 1361, em sua cidade natal, e foi sepultado em Wingfield, Suffolk, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John de Wingfield родился в 1325 г. в местности вингфиелд, суффолк, Англия, его отцу по имени John Wingfield было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Honeypot, 17. Он женился на женщине по имени Alianore de Glanville около 1348 г. в местности вингфиелд, суффолк, Англия. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер перед 8 ноябрь 1361 г. в его родном городе и был похоронен в местности вингфиелд, суффолк, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir John de Wingfield nació en 1325, en Wingfield, Suffolk, Inglaterra, su papá, John Wingfield, tenía 20 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Honeypot, tenía 17 años. Se casó con Alianore de Glanville aproximadamente 1348, en Wingfield, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió antes de 8 de noviembre de 1361, en su pueblo, y fue sepultado en Wingfield, Suffolk, Inglaterra.
